chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6692 of 2020 Muhammad Juman Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA 28572/20 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.05.2025 None for petitioner. Mr. Sadruddin for respondents No.3 and 4. Mr. Amir Hussain, Focal Person SSIC. -.-.- This is an old case of 2020 which is almost five years old. It was last taken up on 25.05.2022, which is almost three years ago when none was present for the petitioner without intimation and the matter was adjourned as an indulgence. In the last three years learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently and today once again learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation despite lapse of three years. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
